profile.name: Constantin-Marcus Strelțov
profile.title: System Administrator & NOC Engineer
profile.bio: Versatile IT Engineer with a proven track record spanning System Administration and real-time NOC operations. Experienced in infrastructure monitoring, platform reliability, and integrating AI-driven tools and LLMs to accelerate technical workflows. Strong focus on efficiency, leveraging scripting (PowerShell, Python) and containerization to automate repetitive tasks and optimize systems.

experience.description: Monitored and resolved service alarms using BMC Helix, SignalFX, LogicMonitor, Grafana, Empirix and Ribbon Analytics. Managed major incidents and escalations, streamlined ticketing via ServiceNow and xMatters, and reduced MTTR. Actively using Atlassian Rovo and internal AI search tools to accelerate root-cause analysis and maintain SOPs.

experience.company: Ingleby Farms & Forests | Hybrid,Timișoara Metropolitan Area — 13/11/2024 – 27/04/2025
experience.description: Administered Windows Server 2016/2019/2022 in mixed virtual/physical Hyper-V environments. PowerShell scripting for server management. Wrote SQL queries in Lansweeper for infrastructure BI reports. Managed Bitdefender GravityZone protecting 200+ endpoints.

Administered Windows Server 2000–2019 and VMware vSphere 6.x/7 / Hyper-V, ESX host management. SPOC for patch management with BMC TrueSight. Provided 24/7 on-call emergency support and managed incidents/changes in ServiceNow.

projects.name: stremio-docker-server
projects.description: Containerized Stremio streaming server deployed via Docker, optimized for local network media playback and central add-on management.

projects.name: home-server-docker
projects.description: Containerized media and monitoring environment utilizing Docker Compose on Ubuntu 24.04 LTS.

education.degree: Physical therapy and special motricity (Postgraduate degree)
education.school: Physical Education and Sport College, West University of Timisoara
Theoretical High School Jean Louis Calderon

knowledge: Enterprise Monitoring (Grafana, SignalFX, LogicMonitor, BMC Helix)
additionalSkills: AI Assistants & Tools: Experienced user of enterprise and consumer LLM solutions (Atlassian Rovo, Claude, Gemini).
Prompt Engineering & Scripting: Strong ability to leverage LLMs (Claude/Gemini) as co-pilots for generating, refactoring, and debugging infrastructure automation scripts (PowerShell, Python).
AI Mindset (Operator/Enabler): Comfortable acting as an early adopter of AI tooling, understanding model behaviors, context constraints, and practical applications in daily IT tasks.
Linux System Administrator course (by SKILLAB ACADEMY CO SRL)
communicationSkills: Excellent communication skills gained through international experiences, academic activity, sales/cashier assistant, but also in extracurricular and volunteering activities.
Combine patience, determination, and persistence to troubleshoot client issues.
Enjoy working as a team member as well as independently.
